title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: CLI and Go library for running Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—browser & Node.js support.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull models with a few lines.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter to use Ollama models as LLMs or embedders in chains & agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (chat history, multi-user, model manager).

title: ollama-cli
summary: TUI wrapper around Ollama written in Rust—keyboard-driven REPL.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for querying Ollama models inside the editor with customizable prompts.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) published to Docker Hub.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builder-style API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for chatting and embedding via Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLMs to your server via Ollama.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that answers threads using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, or continue writing with Ollama.

title: ollama-dbee
summary: DBeaver extension that adds SQL autocomplete and explanation powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve integration for horizontally scaling Ollama models across GPUs.

title: Awesome-Ollama
summary: Curated list of tools, libraries, tutorials, and projects in the Ollama ecosystem.
